description: Testing album list display including default views, ordering, and different view modes.

sub_items.description: Testing album title display with various character types and length constraints while ensuring design compliance.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Title of album display matching with design

Test with:
- EN characters
- JP characters: Full size, half size...
- Number characters
- Special characters (Spaces, symbols...)
- Bad words from config file
....
expected_result: - Title of album is displayed with format matching design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Title of album display when having min/max length

Test with many character types
expected_result: - Title of album is displayed with format matching design

sub_items.description: Testing album description display with various character types and length constraints while maintaining design compliance.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify description of album display matching with design

Test with:
- EN characters
- JP characters: Full size, half size...
- Number characters
- Special characters (Spaces, symbols...)
- Bad words from config file
....
expected_result: - Description of album is displayed with format matching design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify description of album display when having min/max length

Test with many character types
expected_result: - Description of album is displayed with format matching design

sub_items.description: Testing the ability to add different types of media to albums, including capacity limit handling.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that can create album successfully without items
expected_result: Add item successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can add image to album

Test with:
- Add image horizontal
- Add image vertical
- Add all format image supported
- Add >=2 images
expected_result: Add item successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can add video to album

Test with:
- Add 1 video
- Add >=2 video
expected_result: Add item successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can add items  = max capacity of album

Test with:
- Image
- Video
expected_result: Add item successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can add items  > max capacity of album

Test with:
- Image
- Video
expected_result: Add item successfully

sub_items.description: Testing album list display including default views, ordering, and different view modes.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display default of list album

Test with:
- Album default
- Has 1 Album create
- Has >= 2 Albums create
expected_result:
Display list album matching with design

Ex:
+ List album item default : photo album and favorite album..
+ Title of album
+ Thumbnails of album

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify order of list items

Test with:
- Order by title
- Order by create_date
expected_result: Display list album as order setting correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display of all items with all view mode

Test with:
- List mode
- Grid mode
expected_result:
Items is displayed matching with view mode which is seleted

Ex:
+ Size of album title
+ Size of album description
+ Thumbnails of albums

sub_items.description: Testing album deletion functionality with protection for default albums and handling of contained items.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can not delete album default

Ex:
- Photo album
- Favorite album
...
expected_result:
- Delete album successfully
- All items on album is not deleted on default album and other album

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can delete album which is create successfully

Test with:
- Delete 1 album
- Delete >=2 album
- Delete album
expected_result:
- Delete album successfully
- All items on album is not deleted on default album and other album

description: Testing default album display including default views, ordering, and different view modes.

sub_items.description: Testing upload functionality for images and videos to default albums, including capacity limit handling.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can upload image to default album

Test with:
- Add image horizontal
- Add image vertical
- Add all format image supported
- Add >=2 images
expected_result:
- Update image successfully
- Display correclty number items on album

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can upload video to default album

Test with:
- Add 1 video
- Add >=2 video
expected_result:
- Update video successfully
- Display correclty number items on album

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can upload items when size of album =  max capacity

Test with:
- Image
- Video
expected_result:
- Update video successfully
- Display correclty number items on album

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can not upload items when size of album >  max capacity

Test with:
- Image
- Video
expected_result: - Update video unsuccessfully

sub_items.description: Testing display of items in default album including pagination, view modes, and ordering.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify list item is displayed on default album

Test with:
- Has 1 image on album
- Has 1 video on album 
- Has >=2 image only
- Has >=2 video
- Has >= image and video
expected_result:
Display list item matching with design 

Ex
- Position of item
- Item attributes: width, height..
- Format items
- Icon favorite

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display pagination of list item

Test with:
- List has 1 items
- List has number item = number condition to pagin
- List has number item > number condition to pagin
- List item on pagin page
expected_result:
Display list item matching with design 

Ex
- Position of item
- Item attributes: width, height..
- Format items
- Icon favorite

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display of all items when setting view mode

Ex:
- Lager mode
- Medium mode
- Small mode
- List mode
- Grid mode
expected_result:
Items is displayed matching with view mode which is seleted

Ex:
+ Size of album title
+ Size of album description
+ Thumbnails of albums

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify order of list items

Test with:
- Order by title
- Order by create_date
expected_result: Display list album as order setting correctly

sub_items.description: Testing media player functionality including fullscreen display, favorite management, and navigation controls.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can move to next item successfully

Text with:
- Current item at the first on album 
- Current item at the midle on album 
- Current item at the end - 1 on album
expected_result: - Move to next item corresponding

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can not move to next item when do not have next item

Ex:
- List audio has 1 item
- Current item at the end on album
expected_result:
- Next icon is disable
[base on required]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can move to previous item successfully

Text with:
- Current item at the end on album 
- Current item at the midle on album 
- Current item at the first + 1 on album
expected_result: - Move to next item corresponding

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can not move to previous item when do not have next item

Ex:
- List audio has 1 item
- Current item at the end on album
expected_result:
- Next icon is disable
[base on required]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify the display of list sliderr items on below item
expected_result:
Display list slider matching with design

Ex:
+ Position of slider
+ Item atributes: width, height...
+ Number of list

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display of item when clicking on slider 

Test with:
- Slider at the first item
- Slider at the midle item
- Slider at the last item
- Slider at on the current item
expected_result:
- Display item corresponding 
- Highlight slider after clicking

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify item is auto move item after condition time

Test with:
- Do not have any action on page
- After click Next/Previous button
- After click slick slide control 
[base on requirement to auto move items when click on items or click on button present]
expected_result: List item auto move after condtion time

sub_items.description: Testing item deletion functionality in default albums.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can delete item on album default

Ex:
- Delete image 
- Delete video
- Delete >=2 items
- Delete all items
...
expected_result:
- Item is deleted on default album and all albums
- Display correclty number remain items on album

sub_items.description: Testing item deletion functionality in created albums, ensuring items are only deleted from the specific album.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that can delete item on album which is created

Ex:
- Delete image 
- Delete video
- Delete >=2 items
- Delete all items
...
expected_result:
- Item is deleted only on corresponding album 
- Item is not delete on default album and other albums
- Display correclty number remain items on album
